job.title: Senior IT Operations Engineer
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: As a Senior IT Operations Engineer in Toulon, you ensure the availability and performance of information systems in a demanding environment. You handle N3 incidents and contribute to continuous service improvement.
mission.1: Ensure production information systems operation and supervision
mission.2: Handle and resolve level 2 and 3 incidents
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in computer science
profile.2: 4 to 8 years of experience in production IT
profile.3: Expertise Linux, Windows Server et middleware
profile.4: Proficiency in monitoring tools (Zabbix, Nagios, Datadog)
profile.5: Certification ITIL Foundation is a plus
